title: Lemonade's Best Quarter Ever
text: Lemonade's best quarter ever Q4 2024 analysis. Company reported finest quarter of profitability on EBITDA basis while managing significant wildfire losses. Q4 revenues grew 29% year-over-year to $149 million. Net cash flow turned positive for first time with $48 million for full year 2024. In-force premium grew 26% to $944 million. Gross loss ratio improved to 63%, best ever, from 77% year-over-year. Operating metrics show dramatic efficiency gains: headcount down while business grew 24%, in-force premium per employee exceeded $700,000. Key achievement: excluding growth spend, company achieved EBITDA profitability for first time in Q4. This represents major milestone on path to sustainable profitability. Management highlighted data-driven improvements in underwriting with AI-powered loss ratio optimization. Strategic priorities: auto insurance expansion with 2+ million waitlist customers, pet insurance growth to $500M+ in-force premium. California wildfire impact limited to $20 million net loss after reinsurance despite $45 million gross losses.
